description: Ladies Wool Lounge Socks with Fairisle Design Are you in need of some good quality lounge socks for those chilled out evenings? Well our stylish Ladies Wool Lounge Socks are the ideal addition to any stylish woman's wardrobe who values both warmth and comfort. Not only can you use these socks pulled up to keep you extra warm but they are also designed to turn over as well, for a bit of extra function and style to your nights in. You can also pair these with your most comfortable lounge-wear to be worn whilst relaxing to keep feet comfortable and warm at home. These lovely socks are made from a soft 25% Wool which is a natural thermal fibre, so there’s no need to worry about whether you’ll be warm. It may even help cut down on those pesky heating bills! While keeping you warm they’re also super soft and kind to your skin so you won’t be getting any irritation from them while you’re lounging around on the sofa at the weekends. They could even make a great gift or Christmas present with their cute fairisle design. They come in three great colours: Red, Grey and Cream, and are available in Ladies size 4-8 UK. They are made of 65% Acrylic, 25% Wool, 8% Polyamide, 2% Elastane and are machine washable. Extra Product Details Ladies Lounge Socks A Great Wool Blend Soft & Comfortable 3 Colours Available Natural Thermal Properties A Perfect Gift Turnover Cuff Ideal For Lounging & Relaxing One SIze: 4-8 UK Machine Washable
